mapper.select:
SELECT b.id, b.isbn, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.publish_date, b.category_id, c.name AS category_name, b.description, b.cover_image, b.price, b.total_quantity, b.available_quantity, b.location, b.status, b.create_time, b.update_time FROM book_info b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE b.deleted = 0
AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.isbn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND b.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY b.create_time DESC

SELECT b.id, b.isbn, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.publish_date, b.category_id, c.name AS category_name, b.description, b.cover_image, b.price, b.total_quantity, b.available_quantity, b.location, b.status, b.create_time, b.update_time FROM book_info b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{id} AND b.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book_info WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_quantity), 0) FROM book_info WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT b.category_id, c.name as category_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM book_info b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE b.deleted = 0 GROUP BY b.category_id, c.name ORDER BY count DESC
